text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
6 
FD_MOS 
LABEL: 
Medicare — Full Dual Months 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was dually eligible for full 
Medicare-Medicaid benefits. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MBSF (derived) 
VALUES: 
0–12 or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment) 
COMMENT: 
CCW calculates this variable as the count of months where DUAL_STUS_CD_MM in ('02' '04' '08') from 
the MBSF. 
^
